name: Picante-Dijon Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to about 1/2 inch thickness and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine the picante sauce, Dijon mustard, and brown sugar. Mix well.
3. Place the chicken on medium-hot heat.
4. Brush the chicken generously with the sauce mixture.
5. Grill for 6-8 minutes per side or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink, brushing occasionally with remaining sauce.
Yield: 8 servings.
